module_info.docstring:
Galiana KPI analyzer.

Reads Clavain telemetry plus optional datasets, computes KPIs, writes:
~/.clavain/galiana-kpis.json

functions.name: parse_timestamp
functions.docstring: Parse ISO string or unix seconds/milliseconds to UTC datetime.

functions.name: parse_date_arg
functions.docstring: Parse YYYY-MM-DD as UTC midnight.

functions.name: extract_session_id
functions.docstring: Extract session id from tool-time event id (uuid-seq).

functions.name: safe_rate
functions.docstring: Null-safe ratio.

functions.name: load_telemetry_events
functions.docstring:
Load telemetry events in period; optionally filter to one bead.

Returns (events, session_to_bead).

functions.name: load_tool_time_events
functions.docstring: Load PreToolUse/ToolUse events in period, or None if unavailable.

functions.name: find_findings_files
functions.docstring: Discover findings.json from flux-drive research and quality-gates runs.

functions.name: parse_reviewed_date
functions.docstring: Parse findings reviewed date (YYYY-MM-DD or ISO timestamp).

functions.name: load_findings_docs
functions.docstring: Load findings.json docs filtered by reviewed date when present.

functions.name: compute_defect_escape_rate
functions.docstring: Defect escape rate = defect reports / unique beads that reached done.

functions.name: compute_human_override_rate
functions.docstring: Override rate = gate_enforce(decision=skip) / gate_enforce(total).

functions.name: load_interspect_overrides
functions.docstring: Query interspect evidence DB for routing override events in the time window.

functions.name: _find_cost_query_script
functions.docstring: Locate interstat cost-query.sh in standard paths.

functions.name: _parse_semver
functions.docstring: Parse '0.2.6' into (0, 2, 6) for proper numeric sorting.

functions.name: _query_interstat_tokens
functions.docstring: Query real token data from interstat via cost-query.sh.

functions.name: _query_landed_changes
functions.docstring: Query canonical landed_changes via ic landed summary --json.

functions.name: compute_cost_per_landed_change
functions.docstring:
Compute cost per landed change.

Primary: ic landed summary (canonical landed_changes table) + interstat tokens.
Fallback 1: interstat tokens correlated with shipped beads.
Fallback 2: tool-time proxy (tool call count per bead).

functions.name: compute_time_to_first_signal
functions.docstring: Current schema placeholder until signal events include bead ids.

functions.name: extract_finding_agents
functions.docstring: Normalize agents from either `agent` or `agents` fields.

functions.name: compute_findings_metrics
functions.docstring: Compute redundant work ratio and agent scorecard.

functions.name: load_topology_results
functions.docstring: Load topology experiment results from topology-results.jsonl.

functions.name: compute_topology_efficiency
functions.docstring: Compute per-topology recall statistics.

functions.name: load_eval_results
functions.docstring: Load eval harness results from eval-results.jsonl.

functions.name: compute_eval_health
functions.docstring: Compute eval harness health — property pass rates and recall trends.

functions.name: run_analysis
functions.docstring: Compute full KPI payload.
